classes.name: Fighter

level_1_features.name: Fighting Style
level_1_features.description: You adopt a particular style of fighting as your specialty. Choose one: Archery, Defense, Dueling, Great Weapon Fighting, Protection, or Two-Weapon Fighting.

level_1_features.name: Second Wind
level_1_features.description: You can use a bonus action to regain 1d10 + fighter level HP. Usable once per short or long rest.

classes.description: A master of martial combat, skilled with a variety of weapons and armor.

classes.name: Wizard

level_1_features.name: Spellcasting
level_1_features.description: You have a spellbook with 6 1st-level spells. You prepare INT modifier + wizard level spells per day. Spell save DC = 8 + prof + INT mod. Spell attack = prof + INT mod.

level_1_features.name: Arcane Recovery
level_1_features.description: Once per long rest, during a short rest, you can recover spell slots with a combined level up to half your wizard level (rounded up).

classes.description: A scholarly magic-user capable of manipulating the structures of reality.

classes.name: Rogue

level_1_features.name: Expertise
level_1_features.description: Choose two skill proficiencies or one skill and thieves' tools. Your proficiency bonus is doubled for those skills.

level_1_features.name: Sneak Attack
level_1_features.description: Once per turn, deal 1d6 extra damage if you have advantage on the attack roll, or an ally is within 5 ft of the target. Requires a finesse or ranged weapon.

level_1_features.name: Thieves' Cant
level_1_features.description: You understand thieves' cant, a secret language of the criminal underworld, including signs and symbols used to convey messages.

classes.description: A scoundrel who uses stealth and trickery to overcome obstacles and enemies.

classes.name: Cleric

level_1_features.name: Spellcasting
level_1_features.description: Wisdom is your spellcasting ability. Spell save DC = 8 + prof + WIS mod. Spell attack = prof + WIS mod. You prepare WIS modifier + cleric level spells from the cleric list.

level_1_features.name: Divine Domain
level_1_features.description: Choose a domain — Life, Light, Trickery, or War. You gain domain spells and features depending on your choice.

level_1_features.name: Channel Divinity
level_1_features.description: Once per short or long rest, you can channel divine energy. Turn Undead: undead within 30 ft must succeed on a WIS saving throw or be turned for 1 minute.

classes.description: A priestly champion who wields divine magic in service of a higher power.
